title: E-File Pinpoint
setup: Both kings stand on the **e-file**, with the black queen wedged between her king and the white rook on e2.
hint: When the queen shields her king, she becomes a sitting target.
explanation:
## The Idea

Classic **absolute pin**: the black queen on e7 cannot move because doing so would expose the king on e8 to a check from the white rook on e2.

White plays {{Rxe7+}}, harvesting the queen.

- {{Kxe7}} is the only legal reply — the king must capture the rook, since nothing else can block or move out of check.
- Material count after the exchange: White gives up a rook (5) and wins a queen (9). Net **+4** points.

## Pattern to Memorize

> A pinned piece is not really a piece — it is a **target**.

Always ask: *"Is there an enemy piece on the same file, rank, or diagonal as its king?"* If yes, you may have a pin. Pile attackers onto the pinned piece and the material falls into your lap.
